# ratatui-themekit

Semantic theme system for ratatui TUI applications.

## What it does
- Theme trait with 20 semantic color slots (accent, text, success, error, etc.)
- 11 built-in themes (Catppuccin, Dracula, Nord, Gruvbox, OneDark, Solarized, Tailwind, TokyoNight, RosePine, Terminal, NoColor)
- ThemeData struct — themes are pure data constants, zero boilerplate
- ThemeExt builders: Tailwind-like API for themed spans (fg_accent, fg_dim, fg_success, bold, italic, etc.)
- ThemedSpan::with_color for dynamic colors not from named slots
- style_* helpers for widget APIs (border_style, title_style)
- style_fg(color) for dynamic Style creation
- ThemedBar: progress bar builder with customizable width
- badge() builder for text on colored background
- separator_line() for themed separators
- CustomTheme with serde for user-defined themes from config files
- NO_COLOR environment variable support
- resolve_theme(id) for runtime theme switching

## Quick start
```rust
use ratatui_themekit::{Theme, ThemeExt, resolve_theme};
let theme = resolve_theme("catppuccin");
let t = theme.as_ref();

// Span builders
let title = t.fg_accent("Title").bold().build();
let hint = t.fg_dim("hint").build();

// Widget styles
let border = t.style_border();

// Dynamic colors
use ratatui_themekit::builders::{ThemedSpan, style_fg};
ThemedSpan::with_color("text", color).bold().build();
style_fg(color); // for border_style etc.
```

## Links
- Repository: https://github.com/diegorodrigo90/ratatui-themekit
- Docs: https://docs.rs/ratatui-themekit
